name: mikiwi-agent
description: Repo-local Codex helper plugin for MiKiwi architecture, refactors, security checks, and validation.

interface.shortDescription: Codex helpers for MiKiwi project conventions.
interface.longDescription: Project-specific Codex skills that route work through AGENTS.md, SOLID, Laravel domain boundaries, React/Inertia structure, CSS Modules, security, and validation rules.
defaultPrompt: Use MiKiwi architecture rules for this change.
Review this MiKiwi change for security risks.
Refactor this MiKiwi area following SOLID.
